name: banyuan
description: 虽由人作，宛自天开 —— 以画布为山石，以组件为草木，以数据为活水，以 AI 为匠心，造一方数字园林。BanvasGL 自研 2D 引擎 + XiangDi AI Agent（SDD + Harness）+ Banyan 低代码平台。

scripts.dev:banyan: pnpm --filter "@banyuan/flow" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/banvasgl" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/banvas-runtime" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/banvas-runtime-web" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/banvas-design" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/flow-design" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/banyan-sdk" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/xiangdi-agent" build && concurrently --kill-others -c "green.bold,magenta.bold,blue.bold,red.bold,yellow.bold,cyan.bold,white.bold,gray.bold,#ff9900.bold" -n flow,canvas,canvas-rt,canvas-rt-web,canvas-dsgn,sdk,agent,xiangdi-srv,banyan "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/flow\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/banvasgl\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/banvas-runtime\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/banvas-runtime-web\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/banvas-design\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/banyan-sdk\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/xiangdi-agent\" dev" "pnpm --filter xiangdi-server dev" "pnpm --filter banyan dev"
scripts.dev:lunlunglass: pnpm --filter "@banyuan/flow" build && pnpm --filter "@banyuan/banvasgl" build && concurrently --kill-others -c "green.bold,magenta.bold,cyan.bold" -n flow,canvas,lunlunglass "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/flow\" dev" "pnpm --filter \"@banyuan/banvasgl\" dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass dev"
